headline: Here’s How Much You Would Have Made Owning Expedia Group Stock In The Last 15 Years
summary: Expedia Group (NASDAQ:EXPE) has outperformed the market over the past 15 years by 3.39% on an annualized basis producing an average annual return of 15.8%. Currently, Expedia Group has a market capitalization of $30.70
